page: Amazon Web Services r8idb.xlarge is a memory-optimized eighth-generation server instance powered by dedicated Intel processors. It features an x86_64 CPU architecture with 4 virtual CPUs derived from 2 physical cores, supporting 2 threads per core. The processor operates at a baseline clock speed of 3.9 GHz.

This instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage is bundled directly with the instance, providing 237 GB of local NVMe SSD instance store capacity. The server utilizes the AWS Nitro hypervisor to manage virtualization overhead.

Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 4 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included. Given the high memory-to-core ratio and the inclusion of fast local NVMe SSD storage, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads that require temporary high-speed storage, such as caching layers, relational databases, and real-time data processing.
description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.xlarge is a memory-optimized, eighth-generation server instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. It features a dedicated Intel x86_64 processor operating at 3.9 GHz, delivering 4 vCPUs across 2 physical cores with hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB. For high-speed local storage, it includes 237 GB of NVMe SSD instance store volumes. Virtualization is managed via the AWS Nitro hypervisor, and the system supports a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. This hardware profile makes the r8idb.xlarge highly suitable for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, and caching layers that benefit from fast local temporary storage and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8idb.xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 4 Intel vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and 237 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, managed by the Nitro hypervisor.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual server featuring dedicated Intel processors, high memory density, and fast local NVMe SSD storage.
bullet_points: Dedicated Intel x86_64 processor with 4 vCPUs running at 3.9 GHz
32.0 GB of system memory optimized for memory-intensive applications
237 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD instance storage
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth managed by the Nitro hypervisor
Well-suited for databases, caching layers, and real-time data processing
